sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83873" key="plh/tomon" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλήτομον·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παλαιόν</foreign> (Acarn.), Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλῆτρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n83873.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πηδάλιον</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.343</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πλήθριον.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
